title: angadenia poeppigii
intro: Angadenia poeppigii, also known as the night-blooming cactus or moonflower, is a species of flowering plant in the cactus family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its sedative and anxiolytic properties, with medicinal compounds such as alkaloids and flavonoids found in its roots and flowers. The health benefits of Angadenia poeppigii include reducing anxiety and promoting relaxation, as well as its potential to help with sleep disorders and pain management. Herbal preparations of Angadenia poeppigii often involve drying and extracting the roots and flowers, which can be made into teas, capsules, or tinctures for consumption.
